deals.deal: BOGO for $5 — Buy Any Whole Sandwich, Salad or Bowl, Get a Second for $5
deals.desc: Use code BOGO5 at checkout on Panera's site or app to get a second whole sandwich, salad, or bowl for just $5 (discount applies to lower-priced item).

deals.deal: Hat Trick Tango — World Cup Limited-Time Smoothie + 50% Off
deals.desc: Jamba launched the limited-time Hat Trick Tango smoothie for FIFA World Cup 2026 with a 50% off in-app deal.

deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
deals.desc: Order any Domino's pizza with any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) and up to 7 toppings for just $9.99 online or in the app.
Order in the McDonald's app to get a McDouble or McChicken with 4-piece McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5.
Pick a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, Crispy Chicken BLT, Double Stack, or Jr. Cheeseburger plus 4 nuggets, junior fries, and a small drink for $6.
App-exclusive box stacked with a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink.
Choose a Double Cheeseburger, Bacon Double Cheeseburger, or Crispy Chicken Jr. with 4-piece nuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via app.
Get a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich plus three sides and a small drink for $7.99 at participating locations.

deals.deal: $6 Meal Deal — Coffee + 2 Wake Up Wraps
deals.desc: Score a medium hot or iced coffee plus two Bacon, Egg & Cheese Wake Up Wraps for just $6 in the Dunkin' app.
Get the $6.99 Meal of the Day in the Subway app, which includes a footlong sub, chips or 2 cookies, and a small drink.
Night-owl staple: grab the $5 Munch Better Meal (sandwich + fries + drink) and add 2 crispy tacos for just $0.99 — both available in the app 24/7.

deals.deal: Del's Real Deals — Value Items from $1
deals.desc: Del Taco's Del's Real Deals value menu offers tacos, bean & cheese burritos, rollers, and more starting at just $1 — available all day, drive-thru open late.
Whataburger's Whatadeals menu offers value items from $3 (Big Ranch Wrap) to $5 (Whataburger Jr.) with a $2.50 meal upgrade — available at 24-hour locations.
IHOP's $6 Value Menu is available all day at participating locations, making it a solid late-night option for budget-friendly breakfast or dinner.
Denny's Slammin' Meal Deals offer hearty all-day breakfast, lunch, and dinner combos starting under $10 at participating 24-hour locations nationwide.

deals.deal: Any Custard for $3 with Code CUSTARDTIME
deals.desc: Use code CUSTARDTIME in the Shake Shack app, online, or at a kiosk to get any custard for just $3 — a standout summer frozen treat deal.

deals.deal: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for Soccer Season
deals.desc: Wingstop has revived its $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for the FIFA World Cup soccer season — a fan-favorite bundle at a solid discount.
